notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds into a double play, third baseman Bo Bichette to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Brett Baty. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Carson Kelly out at 1st.
